subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! We summon you, at all times, unto God, your Lord, the All-Merciful, and We desire naught else thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احبائی انا ندعوکم فی کل الاحیان الی الله ربکم الرحمن و مااردنا بذلک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @nearness and remoteness, @belief and denial, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
